candidates.why: This is the only operating D&A row clearly tied to the leasing/property administration cost bucket, but it appears as a component beneath the already selected parent row 'Lease and property administration costs', so adding it separately would risk double counting.
This D&A row sits under central administrative costs, not the selected COGS bucket, so it is not relevant for COGS_DA.

variables.notes: No separate COGS-related D&A should be added. 'Depreciation in Leasing Expenses' appears embedded within the already selected COGS parent bucket via 'Lease and property administration costs'.

candidates.why: This is an operating D&A row under central administrative costs. The selected XSGA bucket uses component rows 'Labor Costs Administrative Expenses' and 'Central administrative expenses - rest' rather than the subtotal 'Central administrative costs', so this depreciation component sits outside the selected bucket and should be added separately.
Although it is a D&A row, it belongs with leasing/property administration costs and is therefore tied to COGS/property operating costs rather than SG&A.

variables.notes: Add only the separate SG&A-related depreciation row. The earlier XSGA selection intentionally excluded the parent subtotal 'Central administrative costs' because it includes depreciation; therefore 'Depreciation on equipment' should be added separately to complete the SG&A administrative bucket without double counting.
